message:
What's New

:repeat: Smarter Streaming & Retries
- Outline and slide generation now retries automatically on failure - fewer interrupted generations, smoother experience end to end

:frame_photo: ComfyUI Fix
- Image generation via ComfyUI is back to working correctly - mid-generation failures resolved

:art: UI & Template Polish
- Continued refinements to UI components - tighter layouts, cleaner interactions
- Template improvements - more consistent rendering across providers

:bar_chart: Better Analytics & Error Tracking
- Sentry integrated for crash and error monitoring - helps us catch and fix issues faster

:wrench: Fixes
- Download URL and version message corrected in version.json
- Various stability and content fixes across the board
